prompt: A hyper-realistic, high-contrast photograph of an ancient, cracked stone tablet inscribed with hundreds of different exquisite calligraphic scripts (Hindi, Arabic, Bengali, etc.). A heavy, smooth, industrial grey concrete slab is slowly pouring over the tablet, filling the grooves of the letters and erasing them into a flat, featureless surface. 50% of the ancient textures are already gone under the grey sludge. No glowing lights, no digital effects, no floating particles. Natural, harsh side-lighting that emphasizes the depth of the carvings. Cinematic, somber, 8k resolution. --ar 16:9
dataset_name: Usage statistics of content languages for websites
insight: The digital landscape acts as a brutalist monoculture, where the sterile dominance of a few languages is physically erasing the rich, ancient textures of global linguistic diversity.
